en: So, that was all fucking me? They hit me from every fucking sign.
ko: 그래서 내가 어떻게 이렇게 맞았는지, 모든 방향에서 맞았어. 괜찮아, 톰, 잘했어.

en: It's okay. Tom, you did good. Oh, I didn't get enough resources spent on me.
ko: 아, 나한테 자원이 충분히 쓰이지 않았어.

en: Okay, what the fuck is going on? I'm getting... I was fucked from every direction. Are you fucking me, Shiv?
Tom. I'm the patsy. I'm the meat in the sandwich.
Jerry is the bulletproof monk. Kendall and Logan are in reserve. I'm the meat in the fucking sandwich.
Hey, calm down. Oh, fuck. Oh, fuck. Oh, fuck. Oh, fuck.
Okay. Guys, everything is fine. Nothing bad is happening here.
ko: 여기서 나쁜 일은 일어나고 있지 않아.

en: Oh, fuck, man. I just turned down a quarter of a billion and now I'm going to jail forever
ko: 젠장, 나는 2억 5천만 달러를 거절했는데, 이제 이 자때문에 영원히 감옥에 가게 생겼어.

en: because of this fucking guy, man. Hey, you. Outside.
Shiv, is there any way we can find out what's coming down the pipe at us?
ko: 시브, 우리에게 어떤 일이 다가오고 있는지 알 방법이 있을까?
